charts.agent-untrusted: agent-influenced execution — model output and tool calls; the least-trusted interior
charts.owner-scoped: data scoped to the spec author who owns a shared credential
charts.team-scoped: data scoped to a single team principal
charts.gateway: the ai-gateway boundary — settled usage and the wire contract
charts.analytics: generation and usage events emitted to analytics
charts.internal-cluster: cluster-internal service-to-service calls the platform makes to itself

PgMcpConnectionStore.translates: a stored shared-MCP credential into a bearer scoped to its owner; the lookup scopes to (installation, team, owner) so no non-owner path can obtain it

PgTeamApiKeyResolver.translates: stored team API keys into exactly the requesting team's token (WHERE id = $1)

assertGatewayProvenance.translates: gateway-settled usage into an analytics cost; a forged or unsourced cost is dropped-and-logged, never emitted

DirectHttpClient.translates: denies agent-reachable code the internal-only HTTP capability; DirectHttpClient's options type carries no proxyUrl, so a proxied internal client cannot be constructed

nonTransition.EncryptedFields: fernet key-derivation interop — a correctness property within persistence, not a trust crossing
nonTransition.extractGatewayRequestId: single-sources the gateway wire request-id across dispatch and cost-lookup — consistency within the gateway chart
nonTransition.effectiveApprovalType: totality over the approval-type enum — a within-chart totality
nonTransition.serializeApprovalRequest: approvals serialized through one home — a single-source wire invariant
nonTransition.APPROVAL_REQUEST_STATES: single-source approval-state vocabulary shared with the Django backend
nonTransition.AgentSpecSchema: tenant-array maxItems bounds — input totality within spec validation
nonTransition.S3BundleStore: frozen-bundle immutability — a state-machine invariant within storage
